entries.greek_original: Μοῦσαι ὅππωσ δὴ πρῶτον πῦρ ἔμπεσε

entries.transliteration: Espete nyn moi, Mousai, hopp\=os d\=e pr\=oton pyr empese
naphe kai memnas' apistein: arthra tauta tan phren\=on
hoi men par' ouden eisi, tois d' ouden melei

entries.greek_original: εἷσ οἰωνὸσ ἄριστοσ ἀμύνεσθαι περὶ πάτρης

entries.transliteration: heis oi\=onos aristos amynesthai peri patr\=es

entries.greek_original: φυσᾷ γὰρ οὐ σμικροῖσιν αὐλίσκοισ ἔτι

entries.transliteration: epangellomai andr' apamynesthai hote tis proteros chalep\=en\=ei

entries.greek_original: κἂν ὑπὸ στέγῃ πυκνῆσ ἀκούειν ψακάδοσ εὑδούσῃ φρενί

entries.transliteration: kan hypo steg\=ei pykn\=es akouein psakados heudous\=ei phreni

entries.greek_original: καὶ Κικέρων ὁ μικρὸς ἀσπάζεται Τίτον τὸν Ἀθηναῖον
ἔγωγε ἧσ γαίησ δύναμαι γλυκερώτερον ἄλλο ἰδέσθαι

entries.transliteration: tr\=echei', all' agath\=e kourotrophos, out' ar' eg\=oge h\=es gai\=es dynamai glykerot\=eron allo idesthai
do we keep up the pretence
tortuous and never sound at all
bear with the ways of the powerful
m\=ep\=o meg' eip\=eis prin teleut\=esant' id\=eis

entries.greek_original: σῦκον οὐδὲ ἓν οὕτωσ ὅμοιον γέγονεν

entries.transliteration: suk\=oi, ma t\=en D\=em\=etra, sukon oude hen hout\=os homoion gegonen

entries.context: Cicero's marginal tag for Pompey's reported speech: whatever the man says, append `and this too' as a private mental asterisk.
On news from Rome: of news, ``nothing'' --- so write to me as to a curious man what the censors are doing.
